name: Dark Wash Buckler
description: Dark Wash Buckler is the Dark counterpart of the Water SWAP Force Skylander, Wash Buckler.
biography: While on a special mission, a team of Skylanders discovered a secret lair where Kaos was experimenting with a new discovery – Petrified Darkness – which he initially intended to use to stage a coup against Skylands. In their fight to stop Kaos, the lair exploded, releasing a cloud of pure Darkness. The Skylanders knew they couldn't let it escape, so they absorbed this energy, transforming them into dark versions of themselves. Fortunately, Spyro learned to tame that darkness within him long ago. So with his help, these Skylanders now have also learned to control it – combining its power with their own to fight Kaos and the forces of evil.
personality: While Dark Wash Buckler was born from pure Darkness, he has learned to control the power within to fight for the forces of good alongside his fellow Skylanders.

story.content: While on a special mission, a team of Skylanders discovered a secret lair where Kaos was experimenting with a new discovery – Petrified Darkness – which he initially intended to use to stage a coup against Skylands. In their fight to stop Kaos, the lair exploded, releasing a cloud of pure Darkness. The Skylanders knew they couldn't let it escape, so they absorbed this energy, transforming them into dark versions of themselves. Fortunately, Spyro learned to tame that darkness within him long ago. So with his help, these Skylanders now have also learned to control it – combining its power with their own to fight Kaos and the forces of evil.

trivia: Despite his artwork, Dark Wash Buckler in both figure and in-game forms, his skin is black instead of gray.
Dark Wash Buckler is voiced by John DiMaggio in English.

trailers.name: Meet the Skylanders Dark Wash Buckler DK

gameplay: These are the starting and maximum Statistics for this Skylander in the Skylanders games. Warning: These stats are not used in any of the Skylander games. They are only listed for completeness reasons.

basic.name: Sword Slash
basic.content: A powerful melee attack using a cutlass.

basic.name: Bladesail
basic.content: A movement-based attack utilizing the mermasquid's pirate sail.

basic.name: Bubble Blaster
basic.content: A ranged attack that fires bubbles at enemies.

basic.name: Somersaulty
basic.content: An agile maneuver used to dodge and strike.

soulgems.name: Octolash
soulgems.content: A powerful finishing move using all eight tentacles.
